summary: Iteration 2 focused testing of the 3 new features: Backtesting, Heatmap, Alerts. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases pass. Frontend: all 3 new pages render correctly with expected data-testids, integrations, and disabled states. Grid save 500 bug from iteration 1 is confirmed fixed (regression: save/list/delete verified via UI in previous iter, backend method now pops _id). No new bugs found.
passed: POST /api/draws/import-csv with FDJ format (semicolon separator, date_de_tirage;boule_1..5;numero_chance, DD/MM/YYYY) auto-detected: format_detected='FDJ', inserted=60, errors=0
GET /api/stats/heatmap: total_draws, max, pairs list with exactly 1176 items (C(49,2)); every pair has a<b and count>=0

POST /api/backtest {grids_per_strategy:10, sample_size:30}: returns 5 strategies (hot, cold, balanced, weighted_random, random), each with rank_distribution length 6, chance_hit_rate, hit_3plus_rate, hits_5plus_chance; sorted by avg_main_matches desc
POST /api/backtest {sample_size:9999}: clamps sample_size to <= total_draws (no error)
POST /api/backtest with 60 draws succeeds (>=30 threshold respected)
GET /api/alerts/next-draw: returns next_draw_date ISO, day_name in French, resend_configured boolean (false)
GET /api/alerts/prefs (fresh user): returns defaults {enabled:false, strategy:'balanced', grids_count:3, email:user.email}
POST /api/alerts/prefs {enabled:true, strategy:'hot', grids_count:5, email:'x@y.z'} persists; subsequent GET returns saved values
POST /api/alerts/send returns 503 with 'Service email non configuré' detail (RESEND_API_KEY empty) — EXPECTED behavior, not a bug
Frontend Sidebar: 10 nav items (Vue d'ensemble, Historique, Statistiques, Chauds/Froids, Heatmap, Générateur, Backtest, Mes grilles, Alertes email, Données)
Frontend /dashboard/heatmap: 49x49 grid (2401 cells), hover populates data-testid='heatmap-hover-info', gradient scale legend present
Frontend /dashboard/backtest: 2 sliders (grids-per-strategy, sample-size), 'Lancer le backtest' button POSTs /api/backtest and renders 5 strategy-result-* cards; Trophy icon on winner (#1)
Frontend /dashboard/alerts: next-draw-date populated (samedi 2026-07-18), 'Service email non configuré' banner shows, Switch has disabled attribute set, send-now-btn is disabled
Frontend Alerts: changing strategy (alert-strategy-hot) and count (alert-count-5) triggers POST /api/alerts/prefs and shows toast 'Préférences enregistrées'
critical_code_review_comments: Backtest chart briefly emits recharts width=-1/height=-1 warnings during initial mount because the results Card animates in; harmless but could be avoided by ensuring ResponsiveContainer parent has explicit min-height. Not blocking.
server.py is now ~1000 lines — consider splitting into modules (auth, draws, stats, backtest, alerts) for maintainability.

In /api/alerts/send, the resend.Emails.send is wrapped in asyncio.to_thread with exception → 500; consider narrowing to more specific error codes (429 rate limit, 422 invalid recipient) if needed later.

logger is defined AFTER _run_daily_alerts references it at module scope — currently fine because it's only invoked at runtime, but consider moving logging.basicConfig/getLogger to the top of the file to avoid future NameError risk.
test_credentials: Ephemeral session_token in mongo: test_session_1784197347394 (user test.fdj@example.com). Injected via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md.
seed_data_creation: 60 draws seeded via /api/draws/import-csv with an in-memory FDJ-format CSV (semicolon, DD/MM/YYYY). Alert prefs also created for the test user (enabled=true, strategy=hot, grids_count=5, email='x@y.z').
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Heatmap, Backtest, Alerts) are fully working end-to-end. The test user retains 60 seeded draws and alert prefs. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty — send returns 503 correctly. If a Resend key is added later, re-test /alerts/send should return 200 with a Resend email_id. backend_test.py is generic (uses TEST_TOKEN env var) and reusable for regressions.
